_comment: Only the DATABASE connection can be seeded here (OPTIONAL). Admin account, object storage, and the release API key live IN THE DATABASE and are configured at /admin. With nothing set, the app boots and the dashboard drives setup.
_appReleaseComment: Self-update metadata. The APK is COMMITTED IN THIS BACKEND at wwwroot/app/app-release.apk and served directly as a static file (no GitHub, no CI). On every android change: rebuild the release APK, copy it over that file, then bump VersionCode and set Sha256/SizeBytes to THAT committed file's values (shasum -a 256 <apk> / wc -c <apk>). Because the served file is the built file, the hash always matches. downloadUrl is built at request time from the caller's own base URL + DownloadPath, so it points back at this same backend; set DownloadUrl only to host the APK elsewhere or to pin a public URL behind a proxy.

AppRelease.Notes: Update downloads now show a progress bar, the app restarts itself after updating, and Settings shows the app version.
